content: Serana: So... what's an uptight Thalmor cocksleeve like you doing skulking around this glorified magical bordello? college credentials Ancano: Watch your tongue, vampire. Unlike you, I don't indulge in cheap provocations or base depravity.

Ancano: I see the stench of undeath has followed you into our hallowed halls, vampire. The College tolerates many abominations, but your kind strains even our generous hospitality. Serana: Stench? Oh honey, if you could smell the reek of Thalmor hypocrisy clinging to those robes… Tell me, do they issue you those gloves to hide the bloodstains from torturing dissidents? Or just because your delicate elven hands can't handle real work? Ancano: You know nothing of the Thalmor’s sacred duty. We guide lesser races toward enlightenment—something your debased, fang-filled mouth couldn’t possibly comprehend. Serana: Enlightenment

Lydia: The stink of your Thalmor robes turns my cunt drier than a skeever’s husk. What’s a piss-elf like you even doing in a proper Nord’s company? Ancano: How typical. A brute from Whiterun’s gutter, barely literate, yet somehow convinced she holds wisdom. Your “proper Nords” are backwards savages, too busy rutting like animals to recognize true power. Lydia: Power? Ha! Your Dominion’s just a bunch of limp-dicked bureaucrats hiding behind magic tricks. At least my greatsword splits skulls honest—unlike your kind, sneaking into colleges like rats to spy on the weak. Ancano: If the feeble-minded students here worth spying on, perhaps I’d bother. But watching your Dragonborn grope his way through spells is more entertaining. Tell me—does he fuck you with the same finesse he casts firebolts? Predictably clumsy? Lydia: Keep his name out your filthy mouth, knife-ear. MJR could melt your damn face off before you blinked. And he fucks better than your prissy Thalmor bedwarmers—all they know is wagging tongues and taking it up the— Ancano: Spare me your barbarian pornographic delusions. Your pathetic Stormcloak rebellion will collapse once the Dominion tires of humoring it. Then we’ll see who’s left kneeling—under boot cock. Lydia: Ohoho, big talk from a glorified paper-pusher! Bet you’d piss yourself if I dragged you to Windhelm’s dungeons—“Advise” , you pointy-eared prick! Ancano: How fortunate for you that the Arch-Mage forbids duels in these halls. Otherwise, I might’ve turned you into a entertaining puddle. Run along before your “Thane” forgets which hole to disappoint you in next. Lydia: Oh—MJR, love!
Lydia: Ugh, think I’d rather gargle troll cum than keep listening to your flapping lips. advising.
